content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 30, 2003

Alan R. Loucks
8509 Everglade Drive
Sacramento, CA 95826

Re: Our File No. W-02-337

Dear Mr. Loucks:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your December 6, 2002, request for written advice. As you have elected to remain in state service, you no longer require assistance with the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act¹.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Jill Stecher
Counsel, Legal Division

JS:jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 – 18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
